name: prismix-image-converter
description: Prismix Image Converter v1.0.27 configured for prismix.online with AdSense account meta, AdSense loader snippet, ads.txt, production SITE_URL and SEO-ready sitemap/robots defaults.

scripts.build:styles: sass src/styles/premium.scss public/premium.css --style=compressed && lessc src/styles/tokens.less public/tokens.css
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run seo:audit
